chunks.title: Daniel's Rise and Accusation
chunks.reason: Describes Daniel's promotion and the conspirators' search for a charge against him.

chunks.title: The Decree of the Satraps
chunks.reason: Contains the dialogue where the conspirators propose and the king signs the law.

chunks.title: Daniel's Prayer and Discovery
chunks.reason: Narrates Daniel's faithful prayer routine and the conspirators catching him.

chunks.title: Daniel Cast into the Den
chunks.reason: Details the king's distress, Daniel's sentencing, and the sealing of the den.

chunks.title: The Night Watch and Morning Rescue
chunks.reason: Describes the king's sleepless night and Daniel's miraculous deliverance.

chunks.title: Judgment on Enemies and Royal Decree
chunks.reason: Concludes with the fate of the accusers and Darius's decree praising Daniel's God.
